title: How I'd Learn AI From Scratch in 2026 (skip the useless 80%)
summary: Jeff Su presents a practical three-level learning pathway for AI in 2026: selecting a single model to go deep with, mastering contextual prompting over memorized frameworks, and building AI systems using tools. The advice emphasizes skipping ineffective practices in favor of focused, pragmatic skill-building.
writeup: Jeff Su lays out a three-level pathway for learning AI in 2026: pick one model and go deep with it, master contextual prompting instead of memorizing prompt frameworks, and build AI systems using tools and agents. The framing argues that much of the common advice is ineffective and that focused, pragmatic practice matters more than breadth. Key takeaways: depth on a single model over scattered experimentation, context management as the core prompting skill, and progression toward building agentic systems.
